WITH TreatmentStats AS (
  SELECT
    "treatment",
    AVG("G") AS mean_G,
    STDDEV_SAMP("G") AS stddev_G
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  GROUP BY "treatment"
)
SELECT
  t."shell.number",
  t."treatment",
  (t."G" - ts.mean_G) / ts.stddev_G AS z_score_G
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" AS t
JOIN TreatmentStats AS ts
  ON t."treatment" = ts."treatment"
WHERE
  ts.stddev_G IS NOT NULL AND ts.stddev_G <> 0 -- Avoid division by zero if a treatment group has no variance
ORDER BY
  z_score_G DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
  "OmegaAragonite",
  "G",
  AVG("G") OVER (ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite" ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "moving_avg_G"
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE
  "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
ORDER BY
  "OmegaAragonite"

FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
ORDER BY
  "percentile_rank_G" DESC
LIMIT 5

WITH SiteCropSurvival AS (
  SELECT
    "Site",
    "Crop",
    AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" IN ('black pea', 'green pea')
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
),
PivotedSurvival AS (
  SELECT
    "Site",
    MAX(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'black pea' THEN mean_survival END) AS black_pea_mean_survival,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'green pea' THEN mean_survival END) AS green_pea_mean_survival
  FROM SiteCropSurvival
  GROUP BY "Site"

SELECT
  "Site",
  AVG(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'barley' THEN "Survival" END) AS "barley_mean_survival",
  AVG(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'green pea' THEN "Survival" END) AS "green_pea_mean_survival"
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE
  "Site" IN ('Kiamo', 'Kibber', 'Tashigang') AND "Crop" IN ('barley', 'green pea')
GROUP BY
  "Site"
HAVING
  AVG(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'barley' THEN "Survival" END) > AVG(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'green pea' THEN "Survival" END)

SELECT AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival_rate,
       COUNT(DISTINCT "Plot_no") AS number_of_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea' AND "Site" = 'Kiamo'

  "Crop",
  AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival,
  STDDEV_SAMP("Survival") AS stddev_survival,
  COUNT("Survival") AS n_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
GROUP BY
  "Crop"

SELECT "Crop",
       "Site",
       AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival_rate,
       COUNT(*) AS number_of_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
GROUP BY "Crop", "Site"

WITH LikertScores AS (
  SELECT
    nep."IDorHV",
    CASE
      WHEN brp."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Very false for me' THEN 1
      WHEN brp."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Somewhat false for me' THEN 2
      WHEN brp."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Slightly false for me' THEN 3
      WHEN brp."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Slightly true for me' THEN 4
      WHEN brp."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Somewhat true for me' THEN 5
      WHEN brp."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Very true for me' THEN 6
      ELSE NULL
    END AS "return_score"
  FROM "behavior_raw_public" AS brp
  JOIN "new_elisa_public" AS nep
    ON brp."id" = nep."Subject.ID"
  WHERE brp."after.behaviors.returned" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  "IDorHV",
  AVG("return_score") AS "mean_return_to_pre_pandemic_score",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "IDorHV" || '_' || "return_score") AS "number_of_respondents"
FROM LikertScores
WHERE "IDorHV" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  "IDorHV"

SELECT

  percentile_cont(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "conc.ug_ml") AS q1_igg_titre,
  percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "conc.ug_ml") AS median_igg_titre,

WITH weekly_shares AS (
  SELECT
    "week_ending",
    "variant",
    "share",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "week_ending" ORDER BY "share" DESC) AS rn
  FROM "SARS_CoV_2_Variant_Proportions_2023_09_28"
  WHERE
    "usa_or_hhsregion" = 'USA' AND "modeltype" = 'weighted'
),
first_25_weeks AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "week_ending"
  FROM weekly_shares
  ORDER BY "week_ending"
  LIMIT 25
)
SELECT
  ws."week_ending",
  ws."variant",
  ws."share"
FROM weekly_shares ws
JOIN first_25_weeks f25 ON ws."week_ending" = f25."week_ending"
WHERE ws.rn = 1
ORDER BY ws."week_ending"

WITH MaternalStrongyleBurden AS (
  SELECT
    "MumCode",
    AVG("lEPG") AS mean_burden,
    COUNT("lEPG") AS sample_size
  FROM "strong_df"
  WHERE "lEPG" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    "MumCode"
)
SELECT
  "MumCode",
  mean_burden,
  sample_size,
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY mean_burden DESC) AS rank
FROM MaternalStrongyleBurden
ORDER BY
  mean_burden DESC
LIMIT 5
